news.title:
Govt restarts IDBI Bank revaluation for stake sale, signaling renewed disinvestment.
Fresh push highlights govt's focus on divestment momentum for IDBI Bank.
news.summary:
Govt restarts IDBI Bank revaluation for stake sale, signaling renewed disinvestment.
Fresh push highlights govt's focus on divestment momentum for IDBI Bank.

news.title:
Govt may seek revised bids for IDBI Bank as initial bids fell below reserve price.
Govt and LIC aim to sell 60.72% in IDBI Bank; Fairfax, Emirates NBD among bidders.
news.summary:
Govt may seek revised bids for IDBI Bank as initial bids fell below reserve price.
Govt and LIC aim to sell 60.72% in IDBI Bank; Fairfax, Emirates NBD among bidders.

news.title:
Centre may restart IDBI Bank stake sale due to low initial bids.
Offers of Rs 40,000-45,000 crore fell below government expectations.
news.summary:
Centre may restart IDBI Bank stake sale due to low initial bids.

news.title:
Cabinet Secretary meeting underway to discuss government's decision on IDBI Bank.
NDTV Profit reports the development regarding IDBI Bank discussions.
news.summary:

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.
news.summary:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.

news.title:
IDBI Bank's Q4 report shows total business up 14% YoY to Rs 6 lakh crore.
Deposits rose 12% to Rs 3.46 lakh crore, advances up 16% to Rs 2.53 lakh crore.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank's Q4 report shows total business up 14% YoY to Rs 6 lakh crore.
Deposits rose 12% to Rs 3.46 lakh crore, advances up 16% to Rs 2.53 lakh crore.

news.title:
IDBI Bank is among 4 midcap stocks showing bullish signals on NSE.
White Marubozu pattern indicates potential uptrend, per StockEdge technical scan.
news.summary:

news.title:
IDBI Bank hit a 10% upper circuit at Rs 67.65 on April 1, 2026.
Buyers queued up, but no sellers were willing to part with shares.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank hit a 10% upper circuit at Rs 67.65 on April 1, 2026.

news.title:
IDBI Bank's stock fell 45% from Rs 118.3 to Rs 64.7 due to privatisation setbacks.
Privatisation revival, profit growth, and improved metrics are key to valuation recovery.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank's stock fell 45% from Rs 118.3 to Rs 64.7 due to privatisation setbacks.

news.title:
IDBI disinvestment pause highlights a policy shift in India's bank privatisation debate.
India's banking system consolidated from 27 public banks to 12 in the last decade.
news.summary:
IDBI disinvestment pause highlights a policy shift in India's bank privatisation debate.

news.title:
Sensex fell 2.25%, Nifty 50 dropped 2.09%, eroding ₹9 lakh crore market cap as 906 stocks hit 52-week lows.
Stocks like HAL, Tata Motors, IDBI Bank, and UCO Bank hit lows; near-term sentiment fragile amid geopolitical risks.
news.summary:

news.title:
IDBI Bank shares hit a 52-week low after govt canceled stake-sale plans due to low bids.
Net profit rose 39% YoY to ₹7,570 cr in 9M FY23; GNPA ratio improved to 2.57%.

news.title:

LIC holds 49.2%, GoI 45.5%; prior 60.7% stake sale failed over valuation issues.
